kicker: An alarm you actually can't ignore.
description: It calls. It briefs. It will bother me until I prove I'm awake. It's integrated into Kisuke.
detail_description: Every morning it calls me. Not a sound — an actual phone call. It pulls the fresh morning brief Kisuke has ready, reads it out over TTS, somwhere along the line generates a random number sequence I have to type back to prove I'm awake. By the time we are done that, I'm at least semi awake and I already know what matters today.
